answer: For 10TB storage in MongoDB Atlas, expect monthly costs around $788.05. Prices may vary based on usage and region. Check the Atlas Pricing Calculator for the most accurate estimate.

results.title: MongoDB Pricing: Plans, Costs & Hidden Fees 2026 - CheckThat.ai
results.snippet: Actual costs extend beyond base cluster pricing to include data transfer, add-on services, and support tiers that significantly impact total cost of ownership. MongoDB offers four pricing tiers: Free (M0) for development, Flex for variable workloads, Dedicated for production, and Serverless for unpredictable traffic. However, be aware that multi-region deployments will triple your base infrastructure costs, and write-heavy workloads may benefit from Flex Tier's capped monthly pricing ($8-$30/month) instead of per-operation billing. Alternatively, the Atlas Flex Tier uses tiered monthly pricing ($8-$30/month based on operations-per-second capacity) that caps costs and eliminates overage charges, providing predictable expenses for production workloads while maintaining the flexibility to handle traffic bursts without additional fees. Beyond base cluster costs, MongoDB charges for data transfer, storage overages, add-on services, and support tiers. LDAP integration and customer-managed encryption keys require paid add-ons on Basic/Developer/Pro tiers (pricing not publicly disclosed by MongoDB) but are included by default with Enterprise and Platinum support.

results.title: How to Understand Atlas Flex Cluster Pricing Model - OneUptime
results.snippet: # How to Understand Atlas Flex Cluster Pricing Model. Understand how MongoDB Atlas Flex cluster pricing works with storage, operation-based billing, and how to estimate and control costs for low-traffic workloads. MongoDB   Atlas   Flex Cluster   Pricing   Cost. Atlas Flex clusters use a consumption-based pricing model that charges separately for storage and database operations. Unlike dedicated clusters with fixed hourly rates, Flex pricing scales with actual usage - making it economical for workloads with low or sporadic traffic while remaining predictable with usage caps. # Get cost breakdown for the current billing period curl -X GET \ "https://cloud.mongodb.com/api/atlas/v2/orgs/${ORG_ID}/invoices/pending" \ -H "Accept: application/vnd.atlas.2023-01-01+json" \ --digest -u "${PUBLIC_KEY}:${PRIVATE_KEY}" | \ jq '.lineItems[] | select(.clusterName == "my-flex-cluster") | {sku, quantity, totalPriceCents}'. Workload: 500 MB storage, 10K reads/day, 2K writes/day Flex cluster: ~$0.10/month M10 dedicated: ~$57/month M0 free: $0 (limited to 512 MB, no SLA) Flex is ideal when your workload outgrows M0 but doesn't justify M10. Atlas Flex cluster pricing charges for storage (per GB-month) and operations (per million reads and writes).
